title: Smoothly Silky Irish Oatmeal Oat Porridge
description: A malty, silky, and adventurous Irish oat porridge made with pomegranate molasses, perfect for a satvik-friendly breakfast.
instructions: Combine oats, water, pomegranate molasses, cinnamon, ginger, and sugar in a large kadhai over low heat.
Whisk the mixture constantly until the oats are well coated and the mixture thickens.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, whisking constantly to prevent lumps.
Reduce heat to low and cook, whisking occasionally, for 5 minutes.
Add the butter to the mixture and whisk until melted and fully incorporated.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, whisking constantly.
Remove from heat and let cool for 2 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
